channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-3394] Test timeout on test suite obdfilter-survey, subtest test_2a
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for James Nunez <james.a.nunez@intel.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: http://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/8589c89e-c486-11e2-ac71-52540035b04c.

The sub-test test_2a failed with the following error:

test failed to respond and timed out

Info required for matching: obdfilter-survey 2a

From the client console

05:50:08:lctl          S 0000000000000000     0 10310  10283 0x00000080
05:50:08: ffff880055501748 0000000000000082 ffff88007b49a800 ffff880063748608
05:50:08: ffff88007b49a818 ffff88007b49a800 ffff880055501708 ffffffffa086c397
05:50:08: ffff8800605c25f8 ffff880055501fd8 000000000000fb88 ffff8800605c25f8
05:50:08:Call Trace:
05:50:08: [<ffffffffa086c397>] ? osc_check_rpcs+0x177/0x4c0 [osc]
05:50:08: [<ffffffffa043060e>] cfs_waitq_wait+0xe/0x10 [libcfs]
05:50:08: [<ffffffffa05f607c>] cl_sync_io_wait+0x32c/0x420 [obdclass]
05:50:08: [<ffffffff8105fa40>] ? default_wake_function+0x0/0x20
05:50:08: [<ffffffffa05f62b3>] cl_io_submit_sync+0x143/0x210 [obdclass]
05:50:08: [<ffffffffa027e37c>] echo_client_kbrw+0x115c/0x1a50 [obdecho]
05:50:08: [<ffffffffa043e864>] ? cfs_hash_dual_bd_unlock+0x34/0x60 [libcfs]
05:50:08: [<ffffffffa04308be>] ? cfs_free+0xe/0x10 [libcfs]
05:50:08: [<ffffffffa08653a7>] ? osc_unpackmd+0x597/0xaa0 [osc]
05:50:08: [<ffffffffa027eee3>] ? echo_get_object+0x273/0x970 [obdecho]
05:50:08: [<ffffffffa027b614>] ? cl_echo_object_put+0x84/0x1a0 [obdecho]
05:50:08: [<ffffffffa027f7d7>] echo_client_brw_ioctl+0x1f7/0x1380 [obdecho]
05:50:08: [<ffffffff81110e57>] ? find_lock_page+0x37/0x80
05:50:08: [<ffffffff8112fe75>] ? shmem_getpage+0x225/0x9f0
05:50:08: [<ffffffffa0283f38>] echo_client_iocontrol+0x638/0x1d00 [obdecho]
05:50:08: [<ffffffff8100b9ce>] ? common_interrupt+0xe/0x13
05:50:08: [<ffffffffa0430923>] ? cfs_alloc+0x63/0x90 [libcfs]
05:50:08: [<ffffffffa0591cfa>] ? obd_ioctl_getdata+0x13a/0x1160 [obdclass]
05:50:08: [<ffffffffa05a53ef>] class_handle_ioctl+0x12ff/0x1ed0 [obdclass]
05:50:08: [<ffffffff8100b9ce>] ? common_interrupt+0xe/0x13
05:50:08: [<ffffffffa05912ab>] obd_class_ioctl+0x4b/0x190 [obdclass]
05:50:08: [<ffffffff81189012>] vfs_ioctl+0x22/0xa0
05:50:08: [<ffffffff8118902d>] ? vfs_ioctl+0x3d/0xa0
05:50:08: [<ffffffff811891b4>] do_vfs_ioctl+0x84/0x580
05:50:08: [<ffffffff81189731>] sys_ioctl+0x81/0xa0
05:50:08: [<ffffffff810d3a75>] ? __audit_syscall_exit+0x265/0x290
05:50:08: [<ffffffff8100b072>] system_call_fastpath+0x16/0x1b
item.environment:
client: 2.1 build 197
server: master with patch 6426
item.summary: Test timeout on test suite obdfilter-survey, subtest test_2a

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
